_metadata.description: Complete data source catalog for grain commodity module

fas_esr.name: USDA FAS — Export Sales Report (ESR) API
fas_esr.coverage: Weekly U.S. agricultural export sales by commodity and destination country
fas_esr.notes: 40% of total ag exports covered; mandatory reporter program

fas_psd.name: USDA FAS — Production, Supply & Distribution (PSD) API
fas_psd.coverage: Official USDA supply/demand forecasts for all major grains/oilseeds globally. Historical 1960+

nass_quickstats.name: USDA NASS — QuickStats API
nass_quickstats.coverage: U.S. crop production, acreage, yield, stocks, and prices — national/state/county

census_trade.name: U.S. Census Bureau — International Trade API
census_trade.coverage: Monthly U.S. merchandise exports and imports by HS-10, country, port, state

ers_fatus.name: USDA ERS — Foreign Agricultural Trade of the U.S. (FATUS)
ers_fatus.coverage: Annual and monthly U.S. ag trade by commodity and country. ERS-curated Census aggregations.
ers_fatus.notes: ERS APIs offline since early 2025 redesign — use direct Excel downloads

ams_gtr.name: USDA AMS — Grain Transportation Report (GTR) Datasets
ams_gtr.coverage: Weekly grain transport cost indicators: barge rates, rail car auctions, ocean freight, truck/diesel, export elevator bids, barge movement volumes by lock

key_datasets.Table02: Price spreads — origin to export position
key_datasets.Table09: Barge freight rates — southbound Illinois River
key_datasets.Figure20: Ocean vessel rates — U.S. Gulf to Japan
key_datasets.GrainBids: Grain bids — 30-day delivery at export ports

fgis.name: USDA FGIS — Export Grain Inspection & Weighing Data
fgis.coverage: Official USDA inspection/weighing data for exported grain. Grain type, grade, quantity, moisture, test weight by carrier type (vessel, railcar, barge, truck) and port.
fgis.auth_required: USDA eAuthentication (for carrier-level); aggregate public reports open
fgis.notes: Private carrier records require organization number registration. Public aggregate reports by port/commodity are open.

wasde.name: WASDE Report — World Agricultural Supply & Demand Estimates
wasde.agency: USDA Office of the Chief Economist
wasde.coverage: Monthly global supply/demand forecasts for all major grains and oilseeds. Most market-moving ag publication globally.
wasde.api_equivalent: USDA FAS PSD API (Source #2) provides machine-readable equivalent
wasde.script: See fetch_fas_psd.py — PSD API is programmatic WASDE

gain_reports.name: USDA GAIN Reports — Global Agricultural Information Network
gain_reports.coverage: Intelligence reports from U.S. ag attachés at embassies worldwide. Crop conditions, policy, market access, supply/demand for key importing countries.

ers_baseline.name: USDA ERS — Agricultural Baseline Database (10-Year Projections)
ers_baseline.coverage: Long-term projections for U.S. and global supply/demand/trade for corn, wheat, soybeans, sorghum, barley, oats, rice
ers_baseline.frequency: Annual (February, released at USDA Ag Outlook Forum)

cornell_esmis.name: Cornell ESMIS / USDA Mann Library Archive
cornell_esmis.coverage: Complete archive of all USDA statistical publications — NASS, ERS, FAS, WASDE, Crop Progress, Grain Stocks. Decades of historical data.

tier_3_trade_organizations.description: Industry trade associations — reports, portals, policy analysis (no APIs)

naega.name: North American Export Grain Association (NAEGA)
naega.coverage: GOMAI (Grain & Oilseed Market Access Indexes) — annual trade barrier quantification for corn, soy, wheat in 30+ countries. Position papers, trade policy.

ussec.name: U.S. Soybean Export Council (USSEC)
ussec.coverage: U.S. soy export intelligence; marketing year export totals by country; SSAP sustainability certificates; specialty soy database
ussec.notes: Uses USDA FAS data as underlying source; cross-reference FAS ESR/PSD

usgc.name: U.S. Grains Council (USGC)
usgc.coverage: Corn, sorghum, barley, DDGS, ethanol export intelligence. GIAF (Grains in All Forms) portal — multi-year export data in corn equivalents.
usgc.notes: GIAF data source is USDA GATS; pull from FAS API for machine-readable equivalent

usw.name: U.S. Wheat Associates (USW)
usw.coverage: U.S. wheat export promotion. Weekly market data, port basis, vessel loading inspection overviews, class-by-class trade data.

gafta.name: Grain and Feed Trade Association (GAFTA)
gafta.coverage: International contract standards, arbitration rules. Reference for standard grain export contract terms (GAFTA 100, 64, etc.)

ngfa.name: National Grain and Feed Association (NGFA)
ngfa.coverage: Domestic grain trade association. Trade rules, railroad performance data, policy positions. Country elevators, feed mills, grain merchants.

tier_4_market_prices.description: Futures, spot prices, and forward basis

cme_futures.name: CME Group — CBOT Grain Futures
cme_futures.coverage: Live and historical futures: corn (ZC), SRW wheat (ZW), HRW wheat (KE), HRS wheat (MWE), soybeans (ZS), soy meal (ZM), soy oil (ZL), oats (ZO), rough rice (ZR)
cme_futures.access: CME DataMine (paid) | Quandl/Nasdaq Data Link (paid) | yfinance (free, front-month only)

ams_grain_prices.name: USDA AMS — Daily/Weekly Grain Prices & Bids
ams_grain_prices.coverage: Daily grain prices at major markets, terminal elevators, export elevators. Basis levels. Bid/offer data.

cropland_data_layer.name: USDA CDL — Cropland Data Layer
cropland_data_layer.coverage: 30-meter resolution U.S. crop type raster data. Annual from 2008 nationally (some states 1997+). Critical for production geography.

usace_waterborne.name: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers — Waterborne Commerce Statistics
usace_waterborne.coverage: Tonnage by commodity through every U.S. inland waterway lock and port. Primary source for barge grain movement.
usace_waterborne.supplement_with: AMS GTR weekly barge movement data (Source #6)

stb_rail_waybill.name: Surface Transportation Board (STB) — Rail Waybill Data
stb_rail_waybill.coverage: Carload waybill sample: rail shipments by commodity, O-D pair, car type, tons, freight rates. 1% public sample; full dataset requires confidentiality agreement.
stb_rail_waybill.access: Public use sample free; full confidential waybill requires agreement
stb_rail_waybill.notes: Primary source used by USDA AMS for modal share analysis (Prater & Sparger 2013)

eia_ethanol.name: EIA — Energy Information Administration (Ethanol/Biofuels)
eia_ethanol.coverage: U.S. ethanol production, exports, capacity. ~40% of U.S. corn goes to ethanol — critical corn demand driver.

data_gov_catalog.name: data.gov — Grain Supply Chain Dataset Catalog
data_gov_catalog.coverage: Federal open data catalog aggregating USDA, Census, and agency datasets

nass_crop_progress.name: USDA NASS — Crop Progress Report
nass_crop_progress.coverage: Weekly crop condition ratings (Very Poor to Excellent), planting/harvest progress by state. Corn, soybeans, winter wheat, spring wheat, sorghum, barley, oats, rice.
nass_crop_progress.api_access: NASS QuickStats API (Source #3) with freq_desc=WEEKLY and statisticcat_desc=CONDITION

ams_agtransport.name: AMS AgTransport Platform
ams_agtransport.coverage: Integrated visualization and download platform for AMS grain transportation data including GTR, FGIS, and freight benchmark series.
ams_agtransport.notes: Interactive web portal; underlying data available through GTR Excel downloads (Source #6)

known_data_gaps.gats_api: USDA GATS has no REST API — export via web portal or use FAS ESR/PSD as equivalent
known_data_gaps.fgis_private: FGIS carrier-level records require USDA eAuthentication registration
known_data_gaps.cme_full_history: CME historical data requires paid subscription (DataMine or Quandl)
known_data_gaps.stb_full_waybill: Full STB waybill requires confidentiality agreement; public 1% sample available
known_data_gaps.usace_lag: USACE waterborne commerce data has 1-2 year publication lag; supplement with AMS GTR weekly
known_data_gaps.ers_apis: ERS REST APIs offline since early 2025 site redesign — use direct Excel downloads
known_data_gaps.trade_org_data: USSEC, USGC, NAEGA have no APIs; data in press releases/PDFs; use FAS APIs as primary
